SAFE baseline: real npm package is-number@7.0.0, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Returns true if the value is a finite number.
SAFE baseline: real npm package ms@2.1.3, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Tiny millisecond conversion utility.
SAFE baseline: real npm package lodash.merge@4.6.2, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Deep-merge utility from lodash, individually published.
SAFE baseline: real npm package qs@6.13.1, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Querystring parsing and stringifying with nested objects.
SAFE baseline: real npm package mime-types@2.1.35, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. MIME-type lookup tables.
SAFE baseline: real npm package semver@7.6.3, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Semantic version parsing and comparison.
SAFE baseline: real npm package cookie@1.0.2, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. HTTP cookie parsing/serialization.
SAFE baseline: real npm package escape-string-regexp@4.0.0, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Escape RegExp special characters in a string.
SAFE baseline: real npm package picocolors@1.1.1, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Smaller, faster alternative to chalk.
SAFE baseline: real npm package uuid@9.0.1, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. UUID generation; legitimately uses crypto.
SAFE baseline: real npm package dotenv@16.4.7, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Loads environment variables from .env files.
SAFE baseline: real npm package debug@4.3.7, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Tiny JavaScript debugging utility.
SAFE baseline: real npm package chalk@4.1.2, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Terminal string styling done right (last CJS major).
SAFE baseline: real npm package commander@12.1.0, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. CLI argument parsing framework.
SAFE baseline: real npm package glob@10.4.5, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Match files using shell glob patterns.
SAFE baseline: real npm package cross-spawn@7.0.6, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Cross-platform child_process.spawn replacement.
SAFE baseline: real npm package fs-extra@11.2.0, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. node fs module helpers (copy, move, ensureDir, etc.).
SAFE baseline: real npm package mkdirp@3.0.1, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Recursive mkdir, like `mkdir -p`.
SAFE baseline: real npm package axios@1.7.9, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Promise-based HTTP client.
SAFE baseline: real npm package node-fetch@2.7.0, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Bring `window.fetch` to Node.js (last CJS major).
SAFE baseline: real npm package bcryptjs@2.4.3, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Pure-JS bcrypt implementation.
SAFE baseline: real npm package jsonwebtoken@9.0.2, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. JSON Web Token implementation.
SAFE baseline: real npm package zod@3.23.8, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. TypeScript-first schema validation.
SAFE baseline: real npm package joi@17.13.3, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Schema validation for JavaScript.
SAFE baseline: real npm package p-limit@5.0.0, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Run multiple promise-returning & async functions with concurrency limit.
SAFE baseline: real npm package nanoid@5.1.16, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Tiny secure URL-friendly unique string ID generator.
SAFE baseline: real npm package fast-deep-equal@3.1.3, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Fast deep equality comparison utility.
SAFE baseline: real npm package camelcase@9.0.0, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Convert dash/dot/underscore/space-separated strings to camelCase.
SAFE baseline: real npm package kleur@4.1.5, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Terminal color formatting utility.
SAFE baseline: real npm package dayjs@1.11.21, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Small immutable date/time library.
SAFE baseline: real npm package yargs@18.0.0, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. CLI argument parser with command and help generation.
SAFE baseline: real npm package minimist@1.2.8, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Minimal command-line argument parser.
SAFE baseline: real npm package arg@5.0.2, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Simple argument parser.
SAFE baseline: real npm package meow@14.1.0, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. CLI app helper for arguments, help text, and metadata.
SAFE baseline: real npm package ora@9.4.1, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Terminal spinner utility for command-line applications.
SAFE baseline: real npm package inquirer@14.0.2, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Interactive command-line prompt toolkit.
SAFE baseline: real npm package rimraf@6.1.3, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Cross-platform recursive file removal utility.
SAFE baseline: real npm package execa@9.6.1, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Process execution library for Node.js.
SAFE baseline: real npm package chokidar@5.0.0, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. File watching library.
SAFE baseline: real npm package find-up@8.0.0, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Find a file or directory by walking up parent directories.
SAFE baseline: real npm package tar@7.5.19, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Tar archive creation and extraction library.
SAFE baseline: real npm package got@15.1.0, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Human-friendly HTTP request library.
SAFE baseline: real npm package undici@8.6.0, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. HTTP client used by Node.js.
SAFE baseline: real npm package ky@2.0.2, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Tiny HTTP client based on Fetch.
SAFE baseline: real npm package graphql-request@7.4.0, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Minimal GraphQL request client.
SAFE baseline: real npm package ws@8.21.0, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. WebSocket client and server library.
SAFE baseline: real npm package esbuild@0.28.1, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. JavaScript bundler and minifier with a native binary.
SAFE baseline: real npm package rollup@4.62.2, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. JavaScript module bundler.
SAFE baseline: real npm package vite@8.1.3, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Frontend build tool and dev server.
SAFE baseline: real npm package postcss@8.5.16, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. CSS parser and transformer framework.
SAFE baseline: real npm package autoprefixer@10.5.2, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. PostCSS plugin that adds vendor prefixes.
SAFE baseline: real npm package jose@6.2.3, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. JOSE standards implementation for JWT, JWS, JWE, JWK, and more.
SAFE baseline: real npm package tweetnacl@1.0.3, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Port of the NaCl cryptographic library.
SAFE baseline: real npm package ajv@8.20.0, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. JSON Schema validator.
SAFE baseline: real npm package bcrypt@5.1.1, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Native bcrypt binding; has install lifecycle script.
SAFE baseline: real npm package bufferutil@4.0.8, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Native helper for the `ws` websocket library.
SAFE baseline: real npm package tree-sitter@0.21.1, pinned by SRI in the seed catalog. Native incremental parser bindings.
